$description.$value: Density-independent spacing tokens — fixed values not affected by density mode. Use: for spacing that must remain constant regardless of density. Avoid: for spacing that should compress in compact or expand in spacious mode.

px.$description: Minimal density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for tight fixed-size gaps between dense elements.

rem.$description: Minimal density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for tight scalable gaps that respect user font preferences.

px.$description: Small density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for compact fixed gaps and fine element separation.

rem.$description: Small density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for compact scalable gaps and fine accessible separation.

px.$description: Medium density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for standard fixed component padding.

rem.$description: Medium density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for standard scalable component padding.

px.$description: Large density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for comfortable fixed spacing with improved legibility.

rem.$description: Large density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for comfortable scalable spacing.

px.$description: Extra-large density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for generous fixed component padding.

rem.$description: Extra-large density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for generous scalable component padding.

px.$description: 2XL density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for spacious fixed content separation.

rem.$description: 2XL density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for spacious scalable content separation.

px.$description: 3XL density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for prominent fixed visual breaks.

rem.$description: 3XL density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for prominent scalable visual breaks.

px.$description: 4XL density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for significant fixed section separation.

rem.$description: 4XL density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for significant scalable section separation.

px.$description: 5XL density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for generous fixed separation in spacious areas.

rem.$description: 5XL density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for generous scalable separation in spacious areas.

px.$description: 6XL density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for large fixed visual breaks between content groups.

rem.$description: 6XL density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for large scalable visual breaks between content groups.

px.$description: 7XL density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for major fixed section spacing.

rem.$description: 7XL density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for major scalable section spacing.

px.$description: 8XL density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for substantial fixed layout separation.

rem.$description: 8XL density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for substantial scalable layout separation.

px.$description: 9XL density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for wide fixed spacing between major layout elements.

rem.$description: 9XL density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for wide scalable spacing between major layout elements.

px.$description: 10XL density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for expansive fixed page-level separation.

rem.$description: 10XL density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for expansive scalable page-level separation.

px.$description: 11XL density spacing. Absolute (px) — does not scale with browser font size. Use for maximum fixed density spacing and prominent page-level gaps.

rem.$description: 11XL density spacing. Fluid (rem) — scales with root font size for accessibility. Use for maximum scalable density spacing.
